dj_text: THE PORTAL HAS CONSUMED the Krasull! IT NOW DEMANDS Spring time blues! FEED THE PORTAL! Last one in the queue coming up.
commercial_text: Breaking news from That Pirate Bot DJ — the playlist is in control now. The DJ has been demoted to button-pusher.
hijack_text: Attention all pirates of sound, listeners across dimensions!
recovery_text: We're back from the void. Don't touch that dial.
title: Spring time blues
